description: Send 1000 text messages of payload size 16 to measure implementation/network RTT (round trip time) / latency.
expectation: Receive echo'ed text messages (with payload as sent). Timeout case after 60 secs.
httpRequest:
GET /runCase?case=290&agent=websock-client HTTP/1.1
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Host: 127.0.0.1:9001
Sec-Websocket-Extensions: permessage-deflate; client_max_window_bits=15
Cache-Control: no-cache
Sec-Websocket-Version: 13
Sec-Websocket-Key: 5H0QIoyCFekSdIJZQozlZw==
httpResponse:
HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols
Server: AutobahnTestSuite/25.10.1-0.10.9
X-Powered-By: AutobahnPython/0.10.9
Upgrade: WebSocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Accept: PPWXPbmxSBwPuW1Gt3dv0aocXQA=
result: Ok, received all echo'ed messages in time.
resultClose: The spec requires the connection to be failed cleanly here
wasNotCleanReason: peer dropped the TCP connection without previous WebSocket closing handshake
